{{Quote|I am sorry, Cularin. You are on your own. Good luck.|Ai-Ari Kuldi|<ref name="CEA" />}}
'''Ai-Ari Kuldi''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and became the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the Republic's [[Fifth Fleet (Ai-Ari Kuldi)|Fifth Fleet]]. During the conflict, the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] seceded from the Republic and became a sovereign [[Star system/Legends|star system]]. Afterward, Kuldi announced the subsequent withdrawal of Republic forces and protection from the Cularin system, expressing their regrets for the situation and wishing them luck.<ref name="CEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ai-Ari Kuldi was mentioned in "[[Cularin Emergency Announcement]]," a [[Wizards.com]] article released on [[December 8]], [[2005]] and written by [[August Hahn|August]] and [[Cynthia Hahn]].<ref name="CEA" />
